title: f-string missing closing quote in thorlabs warning
description: thorlabs.py line 68: f-string starts with f" but the DEFAULT_DLL_PATH reference uses a raw quote: 'Resolve to use Thorlabs cameras.\nDefault path: "{DEFAULT_DLL_PATH}"' — the {DEFAULT_DLL_PATH} is inside a non-f-string continuation. Verify if this renders correctly.
